Lyrics.text:
Ampidino eto anio ny herinao, Ray ô,
Henoy ny vavakay avy ao am-po.
Trotroinay Aminao ka mba jereo
’Reto zanakao.

Lyrics.label: ref
Lyrics.text:
Feo 2, 4 Inoanay fa hitarika azy Ianao.
Na aiza na aiza aleha
hiambina azy Ianao.)
Feo 1, 3 Fenoy ny vavakay
Feo 1, 3 Ka valio ’zahay
Feo 2, 4 Satria fantatray fa tia azy Ianao,
Feo 1, 2, 3, 4 Ka ambany elatrao no ialofany
Feo 1, 3, 4 Raha sendra ny manjo
Raha sendra ny ady sarotra e!

Irinay koa ny hasoavanao, Ray ô,
Tsy hisaraka aminy na aiza aleha,
Fa hamirapiratra, ho hitany
Fa tia azy Ianao.
